title: getOwner
description: Returns the current reactive owner (the computation or root that owns the current scope).
returns_desc: The current <0>Owner</0>, or <1>null</1> if called outside a reactive scope.
usage_states: The page writer's <0>Page</0> calls <1>getOwner</1> in the component body, while a synchronous scope still exists. It hands that owner to the handler so a later <2>onCleanup</2> can attach to the right scope after awaiting.
in_the_wild: See this owner threaded through async work in the <0>page-writer walkthrough</0>.
